calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-06-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Continued hearing on Petitioner's Writ of Mandate: Refer to Word Minutes for details of ruling. (503/TLJ)

Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Continued To Nov-13-14 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing on Petitioner's Writ of Mandate (consolidated with #513488 for purposes of the writ hearing only).

APPEARANCES: Jay Wallace, Esq. 415/601-2081 for petitioner Berit Muh; Brian F. Crossman, Deputy City Attorney, Office of the City Attorney, 415/554-4690 for Respondents City & County of San Francisco, et al.; Steven L. Vettel, Esq. of Farella Braun + Martel LLP 415/954-4400 for Real Party in Interest California Masonic Memorial Temple.

RULING: Hearing held. The Court announced its tentative rulings/findings on certain issues as set forth on the record. As to the remaining issues where the Court raised its concerns, parties are to submit supplemental simultaneous briefs no later than 10/31/14 at 2:00pm. Briefs not to exceed 10 pages. Courtesy copies to be lodged with Dept. 503. No reply. The Court continued the hearing to 11/13/14 at 1:30pm. If the City Attorney is in trial on 11/13/14, then the Court has reserved 11/21/14 at 1:30pm for the hearing. The Court will entertain any oral argument on the announced tentative rulings/findings at the next hearing as no additional briefing is necessary on those issues. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Joan Marie Columbini, Behmke Reporting and Video Services, CSR #5435, 415-597-5600/800-335-3376 (503/TLJ)

Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-11-2014 Continued To Oct-17-14 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES: Hearing on petitioner's petition for writ of mandate: Refer to Word Minutes for details of hearing. (503/TLJ)
